synopsis: A Strange Journey through the mind leads Quon to ancient Japan. A new Attractor is discovered, and while this dream state becomes more dangerous, so does the situation for their new would be ally.

title: Venus Versus Virus
synonyms: ヴィーナス ヴァーサス ヴァイアラス
synopsis: After a lifetime of seeing ghosts, young Sumire is recruited by powerful Lucia to fight demons! The girls battle darkness as members of the Venus Vanguard, a group dedicated to ridding the world of its greatest threat—Virus. As they discover why every life is worth saving, they also learn their own unlocked potential for evil. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Summer Days with Coo
synopsis: Kouichi Uehara is a fourth grade student living in the suburb of Tokyo. One day, he picks up a large stone which turns out to be a fossil of a baby "Kappa" sleeping underground for the past 300 years, and names it "Coo". Koichi and Coo become good friends and starts living with his family. However, Coo could not adjust to the life style in Tokyo and starts to miss his family. On a hot summer day, Koichi and Coo decide to go on an adventurous road trip to find his peers. (Source: AniDB)

title: Our Home's Fox Deity
synopsis: The Mizuchi bloodline has long been hunted by Yokai, or monsters. Toru and Noboru Takagami are descendents of this bloodline, and under their grandmother's discretion, are given a secret weapon to combat these monsters. It is Tenko Kugen, a fox deity who can take the shape of a man or woman at will. The mischievous deity is accompanied by a shrine maiden, Ko, who will both live with the Takagami brothers at their house. Life just got complicated. (Source: NIS America)

title: Butlers x Battlers
synopsis: Koma Jinguji (Jay) is the smart and handsome student council president. His elegant smile captures the hearts of women. Tsubasa Hayakawa is a multi-talented and gentle shop assistant at a café. His cafe latte with owl latte art is very popular with female customers. The two men travel through time to fight their archenemy. The charming "Butlers," as they are called, fight supernatural battles and also experience a slapstick comedic life at their academy. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: GHOST CONCERT : missing Songs
titleNative: ゴーストコンサート: missing Songs
synonyms: โกสต์คอนเสิร์ต : บทเพลงที่หายไป
synopsis: The year is 2045, in a world where songs have been banned. Instead of humans playing instruments and creating music, a music app titled "MiucS" is in charge of these things. High school student Seria goes out with her friends one day, but she happens to hear someone singing, which is supposed to be prohibited. What she finds is a lone ghost, a "Great Ghost" who has appeared from outside this world. Now Seria must decide whether to stay silent or risk everything to bring music back to the world. (Source: Anime News Network, Crunchyroll, edited)

title: Letter Bee: Light and Blue Night Fantasy
titleRomaji: Tegami Bachi: Hikari to Ao no Gensou Yawa
titleEnglish: Letter Bee: Light and Blue Night Fantasy
titleNative: テガミバチ 〜光と青の幻想夜話〜
synopsis: The story takes place in the land of Amber Ground, a place of perpetual night only partially illuminated by an artificial sun. Lag Seeing works as a "Letter Bee" (delivery boy) at the "Bee Hive" (a delivery service), with his Dingo, Niche, and her "pet", Steak, traveling with him. He is entrusted with the "hearts" of the everyone in Amber Ground to deliver their packages. (Source: Wikipedia) Note: The pilot episode of Tegami Bachi shown during the Jump Super Anime Tour in the Fall of 2008, the story was later incorporated into episode 17 of the first season.

title: Kusunoki no Bannin
synonyms: The Keeper of the Camphor Tree
synopsis: Adaptation of Keigo Hagashino's Kusunoki no Bannin novel about a mysterious camphor tree that is said to grant wishes if you pray to it, and the young man who becomes its guardian.

title: Phantom Quest Corp.
synonyms: Spiriti & Affini S.r.l.: Società a razionalità Limitata
synopsis: In a country where companies are categorized into many subdivisions and corporations, only one of them is a ghost corp - the Phantom quest corp. When otherworldly supernatural phenomenon threatens the city and its populace, Ayaka Kisaragi and her employees are on the job to fight any and all supernatural menace. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: The Legend of Luoxiaohei
synopsis: The story begins on a rainy night, when a homeless little black cat is brought home by a young girl Luo Xiaobai. She names the cat Luo Xiaohei. However, Luo Xiaohei is no ordinary cat: he is a supernatural entity that hosts several small creatures called Heixiu. As Luo Xiaohei new life soon threatened by the mysterious Diting, who commands three winged wolves.

title: HUGtto! Precure ♡ Futari wa Precure All Stars Memories
titleRomaji: HUGtto! Precure ♡ Futari wa Precure All Stars Memories
titleNative: ＨＵＧっと！プリキュア♡ふたりはプリキュア オールスターズメモリーズ
synonyms: Hugtto! Pretty Cure x Futari wa Pretty Cure Movie: All Stars Memories
synopsis: Celebrating the 15th anniversary of the Precure franchise, and the eleventh Precure All Stars crossover film. A mysterious monster named Miden has appeared, stealing away the Precures' memories and reverting them to the state of a small child. The HUGtto! Precure team joins forces with the Futari wa Precure team to retrieve the stolen memories and powers of every other Precure team so far!
